MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative For Summary Adjudication
Off Calendar Nov-13-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Benjamin Humphreys, Esq., (415)391-6496 of Law Offices of Richard Hurlburt for Plaintiff/Opposing party Maria Palacpac

John Boessenecker, Esq., (415)392-3374 for Defendant/Moving party Ehlanie Palacpac

Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral arguments adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT EHLANIE PALACPAC MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative For Summary Adjudication is DENIED. There are triable issues of fact regarding reasonable notice to the true owner; and circumstances surrounding filing of the probate case and statements made therein. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)
